description:
HDFC Ergo Health Optima Restore Insurance Plan is a Comprehensive Online Health Insurance Plan that provides comprehensive cover for the entire family.
And, ICICI Lombard's Health AdvantEdge is a holistic plan designed to cater to your healthcare needs at all stages.

In this video, we have compared 2 popular health plans available in the market : HDFC ERGO Optima Secure & ICICI Lombard Health AdvantEdge. We have compared the features, eligibility criteria , premiums of HDFC ERGO Optima Secure & ICICI Lombard Health AdvantEdge.

WATCH OUR VIDEO FOR MORE DETAILS :)
✅  To buy insurance policies, click here - https://hareepatti.com/contact-us/ 

✅ ICICI Lombard Health AdvantEDGE Details 2022 * latest* - https://youtu.be/6CRPAw2si54

 ✅ *UPDATED* HDFC ERGO Optima Secure Details : https://youtu.be/SXQkYwhZ7J8

comments.text:
Optima Secure policy with the following new features which will be effective from 21st October 2022 under
UIN - HDFHLIP23123V022223 allotted by the Insurance Regulatory Development Authority of India, IRDAI.

 
No room rent capping - The feature on no room rent capping will assist customer in reducing their out-of-pocket expenses and further give freedom to customer to select the hospitalisation room of their choice.

	Pro rata cancellation - With this feature you will pay for the exact number of days you were covered under the policy even if you choose to cancel the policy mid-year. Earlier you could cancel your policy on short scale basis.

	Deductible buy-back - Allows you to reduce or waive the applicable deductible once in the lifetime of the policy and after completion of five continuous policy year within this policy (with deductible option).
